Items.Description:
一旦被暂停，开发团队将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，开发团队将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，开发团队的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己才能访问。

如果开发团队没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记开发团队：

使开发团队的所有帖子不那么明显

举报其他不当行为

坚持不懈的开发团队将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Once suspended, devteam will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, devteam will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by devteam will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If devteam is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag devteam:

Make all posts by devteam less visible

devteam consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging devteam will restore default visibility to their posts.
Items.Author: thepracticaldev

Items.Title: 50 个高质量开发人员职位 - 本周创业开发职位 [2023 年 7 月 20 日] - 第 4 篇文章 | 50 high quality developer jobs - Startup Dev Jobs of The Week [20th July, 2023] - Post 4
Items.Description:
穆昆德·莫汉

发表于 7 月 20 日

嘿，这是本系列的第三部分。

欢迎来到我们的 Dev.to 系列，我们列出了每周都会策划的部分高质量开发人员职位。

详细了解我们运行该项目的原因以及我们每周如何寻找和策划这些高质量的工作。

每周给你带来什么？

我们深入研究了 30 多个招聘委员会，其中包括 20 多个来自领先风险投资公司的招聘委员会，并编制了 50 个符合这些标准的招聘职位：

  • 由排名前 5% 的 VC 提供支持
  • 公司 Glassdoor 评级 4+
  • 过去两年中其细分市场和规模中排名前四分之一的团队规模增长
  • 职位新鲜（暗示正在积极招聘）

为了帮助您进行评估，我们还提供了来自 CrunchBase 的资金信息、来自 LinkedIn 的团队成长详细信息、来自 Glassdoor 的评级以及职位详细信息。 我们的目标是在不同经验水平的前端、后端和全栈角色之间取得平衡。 目前，我们在美国和印度提供远程、混合和面对面的职位。

我们的时事通讯通常还包含有助于您职业发展的内容，特别是在创业生态系统中。

以下是我们本周提供的一些职位：

他们正在为亚特兰大办事处招聘人员。 是一家创新多式联运解决方案的科技公司。 他们正在招聘佛罗里达州的全栈工程师（远程工作）。 是一个云应用监控平台。 该职位空缺是在美国远程担任高级后端系统工程师。 这是链接。

他们得到了 Vistara Capital Partners、The Argentum Group、Aarin Capital、Michael Herzig、Ashish Lakhanpal 的支持。 这是印度团队在班加罗尔办事处的现场职位。 本周的亮点包括：

  • 美国有 25 个职位，印度有 25 个职位。
  • 我们在印度有 9 个前端、9 个后端和 7 个全栈职位。
  • 我们在美国有 8 个前端、8 个后端和 9 个全栈角色。
  • 在经验水平方面，11个职位要求经验少于2年（或没有指定级别），28个职位要求3-6年经验，11个职位要求至少6年经验。

要进一步探索这些机会，您可以在我们最新的帖子{Startups} && {Devs}中找到所有相关详细信息

我们本周的更新到此结束。 我们下周见。 记住，你很棒！ 凯瑟琳·格雷森·南兹 - 5 月 18 日

一旦被暂停，mohanmukund13 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，mohanmukund13 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，mohanmukund13 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己才能访问。

如果 mohanmukund13 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 mohanmukund13：

使 mohanmukund13 的所有帖子不那么明显

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 mohanmukund13 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Mukund Mohan

Posted on Jul 20

 

Hey there, Here's the third installment of this series.

TLDR: Check out 50 developer job opportunities weekly from top VC-backed startups at {Startups} && {Devs}.

Welcome to our Dev.to series where we list a portion of high quality developer jobs that we curate every week.

  Read more about why we run this project and how we source and curate these high quality jobs every week.  

What's in it for you every week?

We dive deep into 30+ job boards, including 20+ from leading VCs, and compile 50 job posts that meet these standards:

  • Backed by a top 5% VC
  • Company Glassdoor rating 4+
  • Top quartile team-size growth for their segment and size over the last two years
  • The job post is fresh (implying active recruitment)

To help you evaluate, we also present funding info from CrunchBase, team growth details from LinkedIn, ratings from Glassdoor, and job post specifics. We aim for a balance between frontend, backend, and full-stack roles across various experience levels. Currently, we cover jobs in the US and India for remote, hybrid, and in-person roles.

Our newsletters often also include content to aid your career development, particularly in the startup ecosystem. 

 Here are some of the roles we have on offer this week:

1. Senior Frontend Engineer at Polygon.io

Polygon is committed to providing fair access to the financial market data to everyone. They're hiring for their Atlanta office.here’s the link.

2.Senior Software Engineer—Backend at Deepfactor

Deepfactor is an Insight Partners, Tricentis, Emergent Ventures, Security Leadership Capital backed US developer security startup.The position is a remote role  Here’s the link.

3. OneRail backed by Chicago Ventures, Bullpen Capital

is a technology company innovating solutions for multi-modal delivery. They're hiring for Full Stack Engineer - Florida (remote available). Click here to view the opening.

4. Datadog backed by IVP, Index Ventures

is a monitoring platform for cloud applications. The opening is for a US remote position as Senior Backend Systems Engineer.  Here’s the link.

5. Principal Engineer (Frontend) at Impact Analytics

Impact Analytics is an AI backed retail automation SAAS solution. They’re backed by Vistara Capital Partners, The Argentum Group, Aarin Capital, Michael Herzig, Ashish Lakhanpal. This is a on-site position for their India team in their Bangalore office. Here’s the link 

+ more such roles listed on our newsletter and airtable

This week's highlights include:

  • 25 roles in the US and 25 roles in India.
  • 17 Backend, 17 Frontend, and 16 Fullstack roles.
  • We have 9 Frontend, 9 Backend, and 7 Fullstack roles in India.
  • We have 8 Frontend, 8 Backend, and 9 Fullstack roles in the USA.
  • 21 jobs offer remote work opportunities, and 5 are Hybrid roles.
  • In terms of experience level, 11 jobs require less than 2 years (or no specified level) of experience, 28 require between 3-6 years of experience, and 11 require a minimum of 6 years of experience.

To explore these opportunities further, you can find all the relevant details in our latest post {Startups} && {Devs}

That concludes our update for this week. We’ll see you next week. Remember, you’re awesome! 🤗

Kathryn Grayson Nanz - May 18
